# zillizcloud_private_endpoints (Data Source)

List private link endpoints under a project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zillizcloud_private_endpoints" "mine" {
  project_id = "proj-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
}

output "endpoints" {
  value = data.zillizcloud_private_endpoints.mine.endpoints
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Project ID.

### Optional

- `current_page` (Number) Page number (defaults to 1).
- `page_size` (Number) Page size (1-100, defaults to 10).

### Read-Only

- `endpoints` (Attributes List) List of endpoints. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints))
- `total_count` (Number) Total count of endpoints.

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_id` (String)
- `endpoint_id` (String)
- `endpoint_service` (String)
- `endpoint_service_status` (String)
- `endpoint_status` (String)
- `gcp_project_id` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
